title: NE12 9SZ, Veolia ES (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/DP3304BQ/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Veolia ES (UK) Limited   Installation name: Newcastle Waste Management Centre   Permit number: EPR/DP3304BQ/V004   "
